answers: Best street food worldwide: tacos (Mexico), pad thai (Thailand), fuchka/pani puri (Bangladesh/India), kebabs (Turkey), crepes (France).
Street food safety: eat from busy stalls (high turnover = fresh food), watch them cook it fresh, avoid pre-cut fruits, drink bottled water.
Popular street food in Bangladesh: fuchka, chotpoti, jhalmuri, singara, samosa, shingara, and rolls. Cheap and delicious!
Path er khabar tips: jokhon garam garam banacche tokhon khao, busy stall e khao, ar pani bottle theke khao.
